rows.label: Demo profile seed contract
rows.signal: Seed profile and auth default point to the same OWNER demo contract without printing the email.

rows.label: Mock auth production guard
rows.signal: Mock auth requires explicit mode and is disabled when NODE_ENV is production.

rows.label: Development demo identity
rows.signal: Development identity source is default_contract; no email value is printed.

rows.label: Effective auth mode
rows.signal: Requested auth mode is supabase; effective auth mode is supabase.

rows.label: Supabase public env
rows.signal: Supabase public URL and/or publishable key are missing.
rows.nextAction: Configure Supabase public env in the intended launch target without storing values in repo artifacts.

rows.label: Signed-in owner session evidence
rows.signal: This command does not read cookies, tokens, /auth/status payloads, profile IDs, or actual emails.
rows.nextAction: Use pnpm auth:proof with sanitized signed-in /auth/status JSON before running AUTH-005.

proofSummary.nextAction: Configure Supabase public env, then collect signed-in /auth/status evidence.
